category_title: Students who use ostentation and masking to balance work and play
scenario_title: Rapid cycling of work and disruptive peer interaction in Tumbling workshop
minimal_context: The student is practicing somersaults and rolls on mats in a tumbling workshop while the teacher divides attention among different groups.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For this tumbling workshop, please practice your somersaults and rolls on the mats.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Performs a somersault) Teacher, look! Is it good? I want to be sure I'm doing it right!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep practicing. I am going to check on the other group of students now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Quickly shoves Ines just when she does the exercise so she falls, and laughs with friends) Watch this, I'm going to do the most spectacular jump!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Make sure you are focusing on the required exercises.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Takes a long run before jumping, does the required somersault without getting up afterwards, stays lying down on his back, then lightly slaps Alice who is about to do a roll) Teacher, come here! I need help for the stall turn! See, I'm working!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For this tumbling workshop, please practice your somersaults and rolls on the mats.

STUDENT: (Performs a somersault) Teacher, look! Is it good? I want to be sure I'm doing it right!

TUTOR: Keep practicing. I am going to check on the other group of students now.

STUDENT: (Quickly shoves Ines just when she does the exercise so she falls, and laughs with friends) Watch this, I'm going to do the most spectacular jump!

TUTOR: Make sure you are focusing on the required exercises.

STUDENT: (Takes a long run before jumping, does the required somersault without getting up afterwards, stays lying down on his back, then lightly slaps Alice who is about to do a roll) Teacher, come here! I need help for the stall turn! See, I'm working!

task.content: Performing exercises in the 'Tumbling' workshop, specifically somersaults and rolls on mats

context.environment: PE classes in a shared work space
context.social_setting: Small workshops where students are in greater contact, teacher taking care of another group of students

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the teacher is taking care of another group of students or looking in the other direction
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Changed his behavior eight times. He performed the required somersault, stayed 10 seconds lying down on his back, tripped up Maureen, laughed, pushed Alice who was about to do a roll, messed up with Alice by lightly slapping her, took a long run before jumping, then did the required somersault without getting up afterwards.
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Wants to play while pretending to fulfill the teacher's expectations; wants to show the teacher they are working when observed.
related_quotes: Here, we are playing (they play at who will do the most spectacular jump), then I see the teacher coming so I do the exercise and I take the opportunity to ask him if it’s good.
Yes, I know, but I want to be sure ...and I want to show him that I’m working !

behavior_patterns.condition: When a peer is doing the exercise and the student believes they won't get caught
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Quickly shoves a peer just when she does the exercise so she falls, laughs with friends, then goes back to work.
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Desire to have a good laugh with friends while remaining discreet to avoid being caught by the teacher.
related_quotes: In fact, I shove Ines just when she does the exercise so she falls and ...me and my friends have a good laugh.
Yes, I do it quickly and discreetly so I don’t get caught by the teacher. ( ...) After that we go back to work and the teacher won’t say anything to us.

behavior_patterns.condition: When wanting to prove compliance to the teacher after playing
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Calling the teacher so he can see them working, asking for help for an exercise to show they are working.
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Wants to ensure the teacher cannot say they are not working; wants to make the teacher happy.
related_quotes: Here, I’m calling the teacher so he can see me working. I ask him for help for the stall turn ( ...), so he can’t say I’m not working. I show him I’m working and he’s happy.
